contract.for_fixed_models: every fixed local collar model (m, delta)
contract.must_emit: exists lambda_bar_{m,delta} > 0 with lambda_{*,n,m,delta} >= lambda_bar_{m,delta} eventually

meaning: Along the realized refinement chain, each fixed transported local-collar marginal stays uniformly faithful with a collarwise eigenvalue floor bounded away from zero.
notes: This clause does not by itself emit the carried-collar schedule or the scaling-limit cap pair.
It is the live faithfulness-side clause still external to the emitted theorem chain.
On the local-Gibbs plus exponential-mixing pullback branch, the recovery/Markov side is already latent once epsilon_{n,m,delta} -> 0.
role: Package the sole nonlatent faithfulness-side clause beneath the fixed-local-collar faithful modular-defect witness.
